ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "max_temperature_f" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_temperature_f" REAL /* Mean temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_temperature_f" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_dew_point_f" REAL /* Maximum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_dew_point_f" REAL /* Mean dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_dew_point_f" REAL /* Minimum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity in percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" INTEGER /* Mean humidity in percentage */,
  "min_humidity" INTEGER /* Minimum humidity in percentage */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "max_visibility_miles" REAL /* Maximum visibility in miles */,
  "mean_visibility_miles" REAL /* Mean visibility in miles */,
  "min_visibility_miles" REAL /* Minimum visibility in miles */,
  "max_wind_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "mean_wind_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Mean wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "max_gust_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover in percentage */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Overall data quality score (0-100) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code identifier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the zip code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zip code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the weather station */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code where the station is located */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "station_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the version change */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event (e.g., rain, storm, high winds) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-100) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality score */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "quality_checker" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_quality_checker FOREIGN KEY ("quality_checker") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code where the data source is located */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, file) */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the source */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of the integration */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "integration_method" TEXT /* Method of integration (e.g., API call, file upload) */,
  "integration_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_integration_user FOREIGN KEY ("integration_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to the report file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of the analytics (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics was performed */,
  "analytics_result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analytics */,
  "analytics_method" TEXT /* Method used for analytics */,
  "analytics_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analytics process in seconds */,
  "analytics_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analytics results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing activity */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* User or team the data was shared with */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing (e.g., shared, revoked) */,
  "sharing_method" TEXT /* Method of sharing (e.g., email, API) */,
  "sharing_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of sharing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
